name: @forwardimpact/librc
description: Service lifecycle management — start, stop, and check services without manual oversight.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Debugging a down service and realizing there is no single command to check what is running.
jobs.bigHire: manage service lifecycle from one interface instead of scripting each start and stop.
jobs.littleHire: start, stop, or check a service without remembering its specific incantation.
jobs.competesWith: ad-hoc shell scripts; manual process management; tolerating stale services
